tag.description: Defaults to Chart.appVersion if not set
tag.title: tag

SECRET_KEY.description: REQUIRED: override in production with a strong random value
SECRET_KEY.title: SECRET_KEY

SPOKE_API_KEYS.description: REQUIRED: override in production with a list of allowed spoke API keys
SPOKE_API_KEYS.title: SPOKE_API_KEYS

backup.description:
Barman Object Store backup configuration (hub mode only).
Requires a pre-existing secret with provider credentials.

inheritFromAzureAD.description: Use Azure AD Workload Identity instead of explicit credentials.
inheritFromAzureAD.title: inheritFromAzureAD

secretName.description: Name of the secret containing AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT and AZURE_STORAGE_KEY.
secretName.title: secretName

compression.description: Compression algorithm: gzip, bzip2, lz4, snappy, xz, or zstd.
compression.title: compression

destinationPath.description:
Backup destination path (e.g. s3://bucket/path, gs://bucket/path,
or https://<account>.blob.core.windows.net/<container>/<path>).
destinationPath.title: destinationPath

enabled.description: Enable continuous backup and WAL archiving to an object store.
enabled.title: enabled

gkeEnvironment.description: Use GKE Workload Identity instead of explicit credentials.
gkeEnvironment.title: gkeEnvironment

secretName.description: Name of the secret containing a GCS service account JSON key.
secretName.title: secretName

provider.description: Object store provider: s3, azure, or gcs.
provider.title: provider

retentionPolicy.description: Retention policy using recovery window semantics (e.g. "30d").
retentionPolicy.title: retentionPolicy

endpointCA.description: Secret reference for a custom CA certificate (optional).

name.description: Name of the secret containing the CA certificate.
name.title: name

endpointCA.title: endpointCA

endpointURL.description: Custom S3 endpoint URL for MinIO or other S3-compatible stores.
endpointURL.title: endpointURL

secretName.description: Name of the secret containing ACCESS_KEY_ID and ACCESS_SECRET_KEY.
secretName.title: secretName

backupOwnerReference.description: Owner reference mode for backup objects: self, cluster, or none.
backupOwnerReference.title: backupOwnerReference

immediate.description: Trigger an immediate backup when the ScheduledBackup is created.
immediate.title: immediate

schedule.description:
Cron schedule in 6-field format (seconds included).
Default: daily at midnight.
schedule.title: schedule

compression.description: Compression algorithm: gzip, bzip2, lz4, snappy, xz, or zstd.
compression.title: compression

backup.title: backup

frontend.description: Hub frontend — spoke-style 3-container pod (oauth-proxy + auth-header-injector + spoke-nginx)

tag.title: tag

image.description: Spoke frontend image (nginx with envsubst + API proxy)

secret.description: Hub-local spoke secret (points /api/* to the local backend service)

SPOKE_API_KEY.title: SPOKE_API_KEY

networkPolicy.description:
Optional NetworkPolicy for StackRox central-db access (hub only).
Targets the stackrox namespace — review before enabling.
networkPolicy.title: networkPolicy

worker.description:
Worker deployment — runs scheduler jobs (single replica only).
Shares backend image, secret, and DB config. Do NOT increase replicaCount
above 1 — the in-memory scheduler has no leader election and duplicate
cron runs will cause duplicate emails and race conditions.

tag.description: Defaults to Chart.appVersion if not set
tag.title: tag

worker.title: worker
